name: Tex-Mex Munch
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the popped popcorn in a jelly-roll pan and set aside.
2. In a 1-quart saucepan, melt the butter.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the chili powder.
4. Drizzle over the popcorn and stir to mix evenly.
5. Sprinkle the popcorn with shredded cheddar cheese.
6. Place the oven rack in the top position and preheat the broiler.
7. Broil for 1-2 minutes, or until the cheese melts. Be sure to toss immediately after broiling.
